hero.title: SYSTEM REGISTRY
hero.subtitle2: // SELECT A SYSTEM FOR TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

systems.sys01desc: Armoured system for heavy industry. Absorbs vibrations, withstands impact loads and traffic from heavy tracked machinery.
systems.sys02desc: Chemically inert barrier (WHG). Full protection against concentrated acids, bases and aggressive solvents.
systems.sys03desc: System for extreme temperature amplitudes. Withstands thermal shock (steam/ice water), molten metal and direct fire.
systems.sys04desc: Watertight mineral membranes for dam walls, water treatment plants and marine infrastructure. Underwater operation.

cta.title: CAN'T FIND YOUR USE CASE?
cta.body: Our chemical engineers develop modified matrices for specific environments (Custom Formulations). Contact us for laboratory analysis.
